description: Pylon is a B2B support platform that combines ticketing, chat, knowledge base, AI support, and customer/account data workflows. It lets teams manage issues, accounts, contacts, and related support operations in one system.
summary: Pylon exposes a bearer-token REST API at https://api.usepylon.com and a remote OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.usepylon.com/ (streamable HTTP).
